text  
ava started the day with 50 pencils. at recess, she gave 4 pencils to her classmate emma. later, she lost 2 pencils while walking home from school. in the evening, ava's dad bought her a new pencil case with 15 pencils. emma came over and gave ava three times as many pencils as she received at recess.  
ava ended the day with 50 - 4 - 2 + 15 + 12 = 61 pencils.
